data.body: df7b DONE: committed acd576b41. _acquire_fcntl now branches on errno (contention EAGAIN/EACCES waits->-1 unchanged; other errno closes fd + re-raises with identity). 4 errno-injection tests (contention, ENOLCK-immediate-raise, fd-closed-on-timeout, fd-closed-on-reraise). RED confirmed (unexpected-errno tests waited 30s then failed to raise on old code). Plan-review took 2 rounds (dropped dead EINTR branch per PEP475, corrected 12-handler caller analysis). 4/19 stories done. Pushing stack.
